problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells — specifically Telomerase activation/inhibition in — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
